016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.response;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
020
021/**
022 * Represents an <c>HTTP 208 Already Reported</c> response.
023 *
024 * <p>
025 * The members of a DAV binding have already been enumerated in a preceding part of the multistatus response.
026 *
027 * <p>
028 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
029 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
030 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
031 * (and possibly earlier).
032 *
033 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
034 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
035 * </ul>
036 *
037 * @since 9.2.1
038 */
039public class AlreadyReported extends BasicHttpResponse {
040
041   /** HTTP status code */
042   public static final int STATUS_CODE = 208;
043
044   /** Reason phrase */
045   public static final String REASON_PHRASE = "Already Reported";
046
047   /** Default status line */
048   private static final HttpStatusLine STATUS_LINE = HttpStatusLineBean.of(STATUS_CODE, REASON_PHRASE);
049
050   /** Default unmodifiable instance */
051   public static final AlreadyReported INSTANCE = new AlreadyReported();
052
053   /**
054    * Constructor.
055    */
056   public AlreadyReported() {
057      super(STATUS_LINE);
058   }
059
060   /**
061    * Constructor with a response body.
062    *
063    * @param body The response body. May be <jk>null</jk>.
064    */
065   public AlreadyReported(HttpBody body) {
066      super(STATUS_LINE, body);
067   }
068
069   /**
070    * Constructor with a plain-text string body.
071    *
072    * @param body The response body as a plain-text string. May be <jk>null</jk>.
073    */
074   public AlreadyReported(String body) {
075      super(STATUS_LINE, body);
076   }
077
078   /**
079    * Copy constructor.
080    *
081    * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
082    */
083   public AlreadyReported(AlreadyReported copyFrom) {
084      super(copyFrom);
085   }
086}
